compiled_state.title: ticket-transition.sh: unterminated here-document warning on every invocation -> noisy stderr
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
Every invocation of ticket-transition.sh emits:
  ticket-transition.sh: line 118: warning: command substitution: 1 unterminated here-document

This appears on every ticket transition call, adding noise to orchestrator output. The warning doesn't block functionality but pollutes stderr logs.

## Steps to Reproduce
.claude/scripts/dso ticket transition <any-id> open in_progress

## Expected Behavior
No warnings on stderr for valid transitions.

## Root Cause Hypothesis
Line 118 likely has a command substitution with a heredoc that's missing a closing delimiter.
